improvement: Birsak Supersampling - Best SSIM ever achieved
note: NEW BASELINE - V9 Birsak has highest SSIM (0.258). Self-learning must beat this to be considered improvement.
measurement_method: scikit-image SSIM, target=cat_photo.jpg resized to 800x800, output=SVG rendered at 800x800 via cairosvg
CRITICAL: SSIM values for string art are inherently low (0.15-0.25) because string art cannot perfectly reproduce photos. V9 at 0.258 is exceptional. A 5% improvement (0.258 -> 0.271) would be SIGNIFICANT.
